timeline.label: Q1 2026 results: revenue $51M (+16% YoY), FCF $40.9M, dividend $0.12/sh, 2026 adj EBITDA guide raised to $210–230M
FY2025 10-K filed: 315k+ surface acres, consolidated revenue $199.1M, FCF $120M, long-term debt ~$560M
FY2025 results: revenue $199.1M (+81%), adj EBITDA $177.2M, ~450 new easements, related-party surface royalties $36.2M
Multiple 8-Ks on land acquisitions and digital-infrastructure / PowerBridge option context (up to 3,400 acres cited)
S-3ASR shelf registration filed for opportunistic equity issuance
IPO at $17/Class A share; Up-C structure with LandBridge Holdings Class B control
Five Point / LandBridge Holdings retains control; related-party agreements with WaterBridge ecosystem

industry.structure: Delaware Basin surface access is concentrated among a few large fee owners (LandBridge, TPL, private aggregators). LB charges for easements and royalties rather than taking commodity price risk.
industry.share_shift: Post-IPO LandBridge expanded via bolt-on acreage (~5,700 acres Q1 2026) and easement volume (~450 new FY2025); WaterBridge symbiosis drives related-party surface fees.
industry.trend: Industrial intensity rising (water, power, fiber, digital infrastructure cited in filings); sponsor-related revenue remains material; leverage elevated after growth investments.
